scene.message: Maki: So this is...{nl} Kandori...?{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: That bastard!!{nl} Where did he run off to?!{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: What's up, Sonoda?{nl} You look really intense.{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: {ctl08:65281}They can use Personas{nl} too?! Nobody told me that!{waitkey}Isn't that super bad?!{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Bingo!{nl} Nice work, {ctl0f:1}!{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: {ctl07:1}!{nl} Let's go after him!{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: {ctl08:65281}Check for traps first!{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: We're really going?{nl} Fine... I get it!{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Let's get this guy{nl} and put an end to this!{waitkey}{ret}
The switch no longer{nl} needs to be pressed.{waitkey}{ret}
